display_name: CamNet — Network Camera to OBS Virtual Source
description: Cross-platform system that streams any LAN camera (phone, secondary PC) into OBS Studio as a native DirectShow Virtual Camera device. No browser source required.

run_targets.label: ▶ Start Receiver (Primary PC)
run_targets.description: Auto-discovers sender on LAN, ingests SRT stream, writes frames to shared memory

run_targets.label: ▶ Start Sender (Secondary PC)
run_targets.description: Captures camera, encodes H.264+AAC, streams via SRT, announces via mDNS

run_targets.label: 🔧 Install Virtual Camera Driver
run_targets.description: Register camnet_vcam.dll as a COM DirectShow filter (requires Administrator)

run_targets.label: 🗑️ Uninstall Virtual Camera Driver
run_targets.description: Unregister and remove the DirectShow filter

run_targets.label: ⚙️ Build C++ Driver (CMake)
run_targets.command: cmake -B driver/build -G "Visual Studio 17 2022" -A x64 && cmake --build driver/build --config Release
run_targets.description: Compile camnet_vcam.dll from source using MSVC

run_targets.label: 🧪 Run All Tests
run_targets.description: Full test suite: discovery, SHM integrity, latency benchmarks

run_targets.label: 📊 Latency Benchmark
run_targets.description: SHM write latency p50/p99 + 60fps throughput verification

run_targets.label: 🌐 Check Receiver API Status
run_targets.description: Poll the receiver REST API for live status

debug_targets.label: 🐛 Debug Receiver
debug_targets.description: Run receiver with verbose output and unbuffered stdout

debug_targets.label: 🐛 Debug Sender
debug_targets.description: Run sender without tray (foreground) with debug logging

debug_targets.label: 🐛 Debug SHM Writer
debug_targets.description: Run SHM writer self-test (writes 100 synthetic frames)

agent_hints.ipc_mechanism: Win32 Named Shared Memory (Global\CamNetFrame) + Named Mutex (Global\CamNetMutex)
